violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Observed home canned jelly in the cooler at time of inspection.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No test strips for the dish machine at time of inspection.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Observed plates not stored inverted during storage.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Frozen walk in cooler contain several boxes stored on the floor. Walk in cooler had chicken stored on the floor. Storage area had bbq sauce stored on the floor.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Beef and Soup in sink to thaw.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Ice maker chute contained black substance.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. Ice maker is severely rusting. Inside chute contains tape to hold it on.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls, ceiling need cleaned.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
